message:
feat(dashboard): add Criterion benchmarks and fix build issues (ft-3hbv9)

Add dashboard_aggregation benchmark suite measuring snapshot(), adapt_dashboard(),
combined hot path, incremental updates, summary_line(), and serde roundtrip
across small/medium/large data scales (3-16 providers, 5-200 panes).

Fix BTreeMap iterator destructuring in adapt_dashboard() — providers map
yields (&String, &ProviderCostView) tuples, not direct references.

Fix pool.rs build without asupersync-runtime feature by gating cx import
and cx-dependent methods behind #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")],
extracting shared logic into try_acquire_inner() and acquire_inner().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -179,6 +179,11 @@ harness = false
 name = "cache_gc"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "dashboard_aggregation"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["tui"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "tui_rendering"
 harness = false
